headline: Dividend Aristocrats Are Quietly Outrunning Software in 2026. Investors Are Piling Into This ETF
summary: Six months into 2026, the boring stuff is winning. The SPDR S&P Dividend ETF (NYSEARCA:SDY) is up 12.57% year to date, while the iShares Expanded Tech-Software ETF is down 11.4% over the same stretch. That is a wide gap between dividend aristocrats and enterprise software. SDY, the plain-vanilla index of companies that have raised dividends ... headline: E-Commerce Update - Australia's Social Commerce Surge: Opportunities and Growth Insights
summary: The Australian social commerce market is experiencing rapid growth and is poised to reach $63.55 billion by 2026. Key drivers for this expansion include mobile commerce, video commerce, and strategic innovations by industry players, particularly in sectors like clothing, beauty, and electronics. The market, marked by a significant compound annual growth rate over recent years, continues to offer numerous opportunities differentiated by domestic versus cross-border sales, diverse social...

headline: Adobe (ADBE) Launches Firefly Foundry As It Pushes AI Tools To More Users
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) has introduced Firefly Foundry, a new platform for enterprise-grade custom generative AI model development. The company is also rolling out a broader freemium funnel to push its AI and creative tools to a wider mainstream audience. These moves have not yet been widely discussed in recent featured coverage and come as Adobe reshapes how customers access and scale its AI capabilities. Adobe, trading at around $210.98, is making these changes while its share price...

headline: Adobe gains after HSBC upgrades stock, says AI concerns are overstated (ADBE)
summary: Adobe Systems Incorporated (NASDAQ:ADBE) moved higher in premarket trading on Thursday after HSBC upgraded the software company to Buy from Hold, arguing that investor concerns over the impact of generative artificial intelligence on Adobe’s business have become overly pessimistic. Adobe shares rose 1.
